title: Megapterium dissectum
uses: Megapterium dissectum, also known as the Antarctic fossil whale, is an extinct species.  However, I can provide general information on the medicinal uses of whales and their relatives, the cetaceans. The blubber of some whales is used as a source of omega-3 fatty acids, which are known to have anti-inflammatory properties. In some cultures, whale oil has been used to treat various health issues, including skin conditions and rheumatism. Nonetheless, the medicinal uses of whales are not well-documented and often vary depending on the species and the specific use case.
